title: InkEngine
content_html:
InkEngine

InkEngine is the recovered Processing sketch formerly named sketch_250309a. Its source is in:

processing/projects/InkEngine/

The sketch compares vector-field, particle, diffuse-particle, and textured-particle interpretations of the same curve, then overlays them as a weighted composite. ControlP5 supplies the authoring controls.

The recovered baseline builds and runs with Processing 4.5.5 in Java mode and ControlP5 2.2.6. Named slider configurations are stored in the tracked data/sliderSettings.json file so useful parameter combinations can be recalled.

The existing child documents are historical notes, code experiments, and partial explanations created while the sketch evolved. They are evidence for reconstructing the design, not a current specification.
